title: gomphrena canescens subsp. canescens
intro: Gomphrena canescens subsp. canescens, also known as gomphrena, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of gomphrena include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support immune function. Gomphrena can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
